manifest.name: Cyclearn

name: Cyclearn

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Cyclearn – 1.1.1  

## Improvements & Refinements  
- **UI consistency**: All view titles and UI text now follow the *sentence case* convention for a more polished and readable interface.  
- **Cleaner event handling**: Event listener functions have been made synchronous to prevent unwanted Promise warnings and improve stability.  
- **Lifecycle optimization**: The `Cyclearn.onunload()` method now returns `void`, ensuring proper cleanup without unnecessary asynchronous behavior.  
- **View initialization stability**: Both *studio-view* and *study-view* callbacks now correctly await the completion of `ActivateView()` before continuing execution.  
- **Command simplification**: Removed redundant plugin ID prefixes from Cyclearn’s command identifiers.  
- **Code hygiene**:  
  - Removed an unexpected `console.log()` statement.  
  - Eliminated useless variable declarations.  
  - Converted empty interface declarations in `I_CyclearnSettings` into comments for clearer documentation.  

## Coming Soon  
- **Image support** for cards.  
- Ability to **add tags to notes**.  
- **A more intuitive and streamlined UI** for Cyclearn Study.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-cyclearn/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Cyclearn – 1.1.0  

## New Features & Improvements  
- **Custom plugin folder support**: Cyclearn can now run even when not installed in the default `.obsidian/plugins` directory.  
- **Templates upgrade**: Added a new *main field* to each template for better organization.  
- **Automatic database saves** after every create, update, or delete action, ensuring no data is lost.  
- **New filtering system** in Cyclearn Studio for more precise navigation and searches.  
- **UI update**: The sidebar in Cyclearn Studio has been moved above the main data table for a cleaner layout.  

## Corrected Issues
- **Date format**: Cyclearn now use a "YYYYMMDD" format instead of the traditional "DDMMYYYY" format. Allowing flashcards that are in overdue to be done.

## Coming Soon  
- **Image support** for cards.  
- Ability to **add tags to notes**.  
- **A more intuitive and streamlined UI** for Cyclearn Study.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-cyclearn/compare/1.0.1...1.1.0

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Cyclearn - 1.0.1 - Patch
## Corrected Issues
- Changed the way the config directory of the plugin is retrieved, allowing database retrieval even if the plugin is not stored in `.obsidian/plugin` folder.
## Coming Next
- **Image support** for cards
- Ability to **add tags to notes**.
- A **cleaner, more intuitive UI** for both Studio View and Study View.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NoahBoos/obsidian-cyclearn/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: noahboos
releases.description:
# Cyclearn - 1.0.0 - Initial Release  

## New Features  
- Create **decks, tags, templates, notes, and cards** directly in Obsidian.  
- Explore the new **Studio View** to manage and edit decks, tags, templates, notes, and cards in one place.  
- Use the **Study View** to see which cards are due for review today and easily start a review session.  

## Coming Next  
- **Image support** for cards.
- Ability to **add tags to notes**.  
- A **cleaner, more intuitive UI** for both Studio View and Study View.
